sql: UPDATE intel_sources SET rss_url='https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=reuters+finance&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=2; UPDATE intel_sources SET rss_url='https://finance.yahoo.com/news/rssindex', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=7; UPDATE intel_sources SET rss_url='https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=site:cnyes.com+台股&hl=zh-TW&gl=TW&ceid=TW:zh-Hant', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=10; UPDATE intel_sources SET rss_url='https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=site:digitimes.com.tw&hl=zh-TW&gl=TW&ceid=TW:zh-Hant', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=12;
